en: On the third day Esther put on her royal robes and stood in the inner court of the king's palace, in front of the king's quarters, while the king was sitting on his royal throne inside the throne room opposite the entrance to the palace.
zh: 第三天，以斯帖穿上朝服，站在王宮的內院，對著王殿；王在殿裡坐在王位上，對著殿門。

en: And when the king saw Queen Esther standing in the court, she won favor in his sight, and he held out to Esther the golden scepter that was in his hand. Then Esther approached and touched the tip of the scepter.
zh: 王見王后以斯帖站在院內，就對她施恩，向她伸出手中的金杖，以斯帖就上前摸杖頭。

en: And the king said to her, "What is it, Queen Esther? What is your request? It shall be given you, even to the half of my kingdom."
zh: 王問她：“王后以斯帖啊，你有甚麼事嗎？你求甚麼？就是一半江山，也必賜給你。”

en: And Esther said, "If it please the king, let the king and Haman come today to a feast that I have prepared for the king."
zh: 以斯帖回答：“王若是歡喜，就請王今天帶著哈曼來赴我為王預備的筵席。”

en: Then the king said, "Bring Haman quickly, so that we may do as Esther has asked." So the king and Haman came to the feast that Esther had prepared.
zh: 王說：“快把哈曼召來，好照著以斯帖的話去行。”於是王帶著哈曼去赴以斯帖預備的筵席。

en: And as they were drinking wine after the feast, the king said to Esther, "What is your wish? It shall be granted you. And what is your request? Even to the half of my kingdom, it shall be fulfilled."
zh: 在酒席中，王問以斯帖：“你要甚麼？我必賜給你；你求甚麼？就是一半江山，也必為你成全。”

en: Then Esther answered, "My wish and my request is:
zh: 以斯帖回答說：“我所要我所求的就是：

en: If I have found favor in the sight of the king, and if it please the king to grant my wish and fulfill my request, let the king and Haman come to the feast that I will prepare for them, and tomorrow I will do as the king has said."
zh: 我若是在王眼前蒙恩，王若是願意賜給我所要的，成全我所求的，就請王帶著哈曼明天再來赴我為你們預備的筵席；明天我必照著王的命令行。”

en: And Haman went out that day joyful and glad of heart. But when Haman saw Mordecai in the king's gate, that he neither rose nor trembled before him, he was filled with wrath against Mordecai.
zh: 那天哈曼心裡快樂，高高興興地出來；但是哈曼見了末底改在御門那裡不站起來，也不因哈曼的緣故而退避，哈曼心裡就對末底改充滿忿怒。

en: Nevertheless, Haman restrained himself and went home, and he sent and brought his friends and his wife Zeresh.
zh: 哈曼忍住怒氣，回家去了，就派人去請他的朋友和妻子細利斯來。

en: And Haman recounted to them the splendor of his riches, the number of his sons, all the promotions with which the king had honored him, and how he had advanced him above the officials and the servants of the king.
zh: 哈曼把他的富貴榮華、兒女的眾多，以及王怎樣使他尊大，怎樣抬舉他在王的眾領袖和眾臣僕之上的一切事，都數說給他們聽。

en: Then Haman said, "Even Queen Esther let no one but me come with the king to the feast she prepared. And tomorrow also I am invited by her together with the king.
zh: 哈曼又說：“王后以斯帖除我以外，沒有邀請別人與王一同去赴她預備的筵席；明天又邀請我與王一同到她那裡去赴席。

en: Yet all this is worth nothing to me, so long as I see Mordecai the Jew sitting at the king's gate."
zh: 只是每逢我看見坐在朝門那裡的猶大人末底改的時候，這一切對我都沒有多大的意思。”

en: Then his wife Zeresh and all his friends said to him, "Let a gallows fifty cubits high be made, and in the morning tell the king to have Mordecai hanged upon it. Then go joyfully with the king to the feast." This idea pleased Haman, and he had the gallows made.
zh: 他的妻子細利斯和他所有的朋友都對他說：“叫人立一個二十二公尺高的木架，明早求王，把末底改掛在上面，然後你可以歡歡喜喜地與王一同赴筵席了。”這話使哈曼很滿意，就叫人做了木架。
